arts.ttl: Brentford ‘in pole position’ to sign player – Thomas Frank’s side ‘working to close’ January deal
arts.sum: Over the past few months, claims from Italy have credited Brentford with interest in Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode. These claims aren’t going away and there’s multiple updates on Brentford’s interest in the right-back. Friday’s edition Corriere dello Sport claims Brentford are among the clubs keeping an eye on the 20-year-old. arts.ttl: Brentford ask €50m for January transfer and blow club out of water
arts.sum: Yesterday, Napoli were linked with a move for Brentford star Mikkel Damsgaard. The report explained the Denmark international is an alternative to Alejandro Garnacho for Napoli, who are on the verge of losing Khvicha Kvaratkshelia to Paris Saint-Germain this month.
